pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
notes: A4 (transport to site) and A5 (installation) are explicitly declared 'ND' in the system-boundary matrix (p5) and confirmed in the narrative ('Transport and installation (A4-A5) ... Modules not declared', p11) — a qualitative description of the installation process is given but no data is reported; not an oversight.
B1–B7 all ND (use stage not assessed; product contains no biogenic carbon content >5%, p6).

Module D (-13 kg CO2e) is the recycling credit (70% of demolished concrete recycled to gravel, p11) and is never summed into an A–C total. In the p5 system-boundary matrix, D's declared status is rendered as three separate marked sub-columns (Reuse/Recovery/Recycling) rather than one — a table-structure artifact, not 3 separate D values.

gwp_total.modules spans two PDF pages: A1/A2/A3/A1-A3 from the 'Core environmental impact indicators – EN 15804+A2, EF 3.1' table on p13; C1/C2/C3/C4/D from its continuation on p14. source_page recorded as 13 (table origin).

An EN 15804+A1/CML table exists ('Environmental impacts – EN 15804+A1, CML / ISO 21930', p17-18) → gwp_a1a3_alt populated. Its A1-A3 total (268) coincides exactly with the +A2 canonical total (268); a separate 'GWP-GHG' indicator (p18, also 268 for A1-A3) exists but is correctly excluded from gwp_a1a3_alt per schema rule.

location.production ('Melbourne, VIC, Australia') combines 'Place of production: Melbourne' (p3, general info) with the Victoria state qualifier and 8-site list given only in 'Product & manufacturing sites grouping' (p6: Deer Park, Tullamarine, Somerton, Sunbury, Wollert, Melton, West Melbourne, West Melbourne (wet)). source_page recorded as 3 (primary declaration); site detail is on p6.

Compressive strength standard cited in-document simply as 'AS 1379' (Product standards, p4) with no year/edition given, unlike sibling corpus EPDs that cite 'AS 1379-2007' or 'AS 1379:2007' — recorded verbatim, not inferred.
Internal consistency check: A1+A2+A3 = 256+6.58+5.62 = 268.2 vs declared A1A3 = 268 (within tolerance). fossil+biogenic+luluc = 268+0.108+0.0918 = 268.2 vs A1A3 = 268 (within tolerance).
